headline: 《痴迷》领跑今日热搜，多部新片蓄势待发
headlineEn: 'Obsession' Tops Trending Today, Multiple New Films on the Horizon
summary: 今日娱乐头条：《痴迷》与《权力的游戏前传：龙族》持续霸榜，本周新片《福尔摩斯小姐3》等备受期待，未来将迎《蜘蛛侠：崭新之日》等大片。
summaryEn: Entertainment digest: 'Obsession' and 'Game of Thrones: House of the Dragon' dominate charts; new releases like 'Enola Holmes 3' are highly anticipated; upcoming blockbusters include 'Spider-Man: Freshman Year'.

industryHighlights.text: 本周无新片上映，但《福尔摩斯小姐3》热度攀升
industryHighlights.en: No new films released today, but 'Enola Holmes 3' gains momentum

industryHighlights.text: 《玩具总动员5》与《穿普拉达的女王2》跻身本周热搜
industryHighlights.en: 'Toy Story 5' and 'The Devil Wears Prada 2' enter this week's trending

industryHighlights.text: 《安昂传奇：最后的气宗》等大片定档未来
industryHighlights.en: Upcoming blockbusters include 'Avatar: The Last Airbender' and more

industryHighlights.text: 《鬼玩人6：燃烧》引发恐怖片迷热议
industryHighlights.en: 'Evil Dead 6: Burn' sparks buzz among horror fans
